Ann Giroux (friend request accepted) now has a chat thread but no prospect DM. All totals unchanged: 113 comments, 38 positive, 2 DMs, 12 interest signals, 16 groups, 18 posts live. March 31 daily unchanged: 4 posts, 2 comments, 1 positive, 1 DM, 1 interest signal.
